q: Endocrine glands secrete chemical messengers called ___ directly into the bloodstream.
___ hormones, such as testosterone and cortisol, are lipid-based.
___ hormone (hGH) stimulates cell division, bone and muscle growth.
___ promotes the retention of water by the kidneys.
___ lowers blood calcium levels by inhibiting release of calcium from bone.
The adrenal medulla secretes ___ and norepinephrine.
___ lowers blood glucose levels and promotes formation of glycogen in the liver.
___ raises blood glucose levels by converting glycogen in the liver to glucose.
___ promotes growth of the uterine lining and prevents uterine muscle contractions.
In the nervous system, information is transmitted as a ___.
